executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification remains blocked by stale external owner-loop evidence; marketing independent verification is fail and artifact is >2300 min old.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Do not certify green until the external owner loop produces fresh measurable outcome evidence and marketing independent verification reruns.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence — artifact is stale (>2300 min)
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification is fail (checked 2026-06-02) and the artifact is 2309 minutes old against a 240-min max threshold.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing; owner loop has not produced a fresh pass artifact.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean and matches current runtime state
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows 21 enabled/total-visible jobs, 0 disabled jobs, 3 running jobs, and 1 live last-error job (internal-linking-watchdog, delivery target misconfiguration — non-architecture).
findings.root_cause: Architecture/runtime topology remains coherent while owner-loop work is in flight.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep direct cron inspection as the source of truth on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Checker=AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK, verifier=ok, independent_verifier=qualified_pass. Loop integrity and shared market-intelligence consumption remain coherent.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only, not live runtime blockers
findings.mechanism: Disabled entries still exist in jobs.json history, but live Gateway topology currently exposes zero disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job removal/disable cleanup.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology in every audit.

findings.title: Loop "internal-linking-watchdog" has delivery-misconfiguration error and no self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Last run hit error 'Delivering to Matrix requires target <room|alias|user>'. Loop has no self-improvement mandate and delivery config may need repair.
findings.root_cause: Delivery target is missing or misconfigured; loop lacks self-improvement to detect/repair this.
evidence_refs: openclaw cron list --json: lastError on internal-linking-watchdog
findings.recommended_fix: Fix the delivery target on the internal-linking-watchdog cron job, and add a self_improvement_mandate section for detecting flat outcomes.

findings.title: Loop "pypi-auto-unblocker" has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Script has no self-improvement mandate. When outcomes are flat, this loop will repeat the same tactics forever without improving or redesigning its approach.
findings.root_cause: Loop was created without a self-improvement mandate or a third-party verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix: Add a self_improvement_mandate section to the loop script that detects flat outcomes, triggers redesign, and registers in self_improvement_loops.json.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are coherent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean and should remain the source of truth instead of persisted-history drift.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing in architecture reports.

ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Live last-error job with 1 consecutive error; delivery config gap blocks proper operation.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the only live runtime error job from the topology.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed the audit against the current live view via openclaw cron list --json: 21 enabled jobs, 0 disabled jobs, 3 running jobs, 1 live last-error job.
Reconfirmed that code-backed marketing consumers (run.py, reddit_monitor.py, distribution_lane_executor.py) still expose machine-verifiable shared market-intelligence consumption.
Architecture-owned gates are all green; the sole remaining blocker is the stale marketing independent verification artifact (fail, >2300 min old).

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification found architecture blockers that prevent a healthy verifier pass.
errors_noted: marketing independent verification is not pass: 'fail'

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh architecture independent verification against the refreshed live topology.
Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence — artifact stale >2300 min
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed and its artifact is 2309 minutes old against a 240-min max. Primary-repo movement is still measurement-pending.

notes: Architecture green here means the architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean the whole stack is green.
Persisted disabled jobs remain history only; live disabled jobs are 0.

Independent live inspection in this snapshot saw 21 total jobs, 21 enabled, 0 disabled, 3 running (agent-architecture-watchdog, codeberg-github-mirror-sync, system-health-monitor), and 1 live last-error job (internal-linking-watchdog).
The sole remaining blocker is external marketing outcome evidence, not architecture runtime drift.
No live timeout-budget repair was applied in this watchdog run.
internal-linking-watchdog has a delivery-misconfiguration error (no Matrix target) — non-architecture issue, noted for owner fix.
